text: A steam engine, electric or other motor locomotive or car, with or without cars coupled thereto, operated upon rails, except streetcars.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 137 — Railroad train

A steam engine, electric or other motor locomotive or car, with or without cars coupled thereto, operated upon rails, except streetcars.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
